title: Right upper quadrant pain after fatty meals
patientBrief: Episodes of right upper abdominal pain after eating greasy food.
openingComplaint: I keep getting this pain under my right ribs after heavy meals.
authorNote: This is biliary colic. Be uncomfortable during episodes but currently stable. Mention greasy food trigger when asked.

symptoms: pain sometimes goes to the right shoulder
history: worse after fried or fatty foods
